positive: A majestic, bioluminescent fox sitting peacefully among delicate flora. The fox has a clean, stylized silhouette with glowing turquoise and gold accents outlining its fur and whiskers. It is surrounded by stylized leaves, geometric floral patterns, and luminous mushrooms. Minimalist, ethereal, sacred geometry style, ultra-detailed linework, high contrast, deep sapphire background with gradient bioluminescence. Centered composition, perfect for apparel printing, vector art quality, concept art, vibrant cyan and gold palette, flat graphic elements mixed with glowing naturalism. Whimsical, serene, cosmic forest atmosphere.
negative: blur, watermark, signature, text, low detail, artifact, bad anatomy, extra limbs, dirty, cluttered, photorealistic, muddy colors, gradient artifacts, logo, typography, celebrity
